proxy.title: Free Anonymous Web Proxy - Browse Privately | Tool Box Nova
proxy.meta_desc: Browse the web anonymously with our free online proxy. Hide your IP address, no software required.
proxy.url_placeholder: Enter URL to visit, e.g. example.com
proxy.feature1_desc: The proxy server acts as a middleman; target sites only see the proxy IP
proxy.feature2_desc: Use directly in your browser, no download or plugin required
proxy.feature3_desc: Supports HTTPS encryption to protect your data
proxy.disclaimer: This tool is for legal privacy protection purposes only. Do not use it to access illegal content or violate local laws.
proxy.how.step1: Enter the target URL in the address bar above (e.g. google.com)
proxy.how.step2: Select your preferred proxy node and privacy options
proxy.how.step3: Click the Visit button to browse through the proxy
proxy.how.step4: When finished, click Close Proxy to disconnect
proxy.privacy.label: 100% Anonymous
proxy.privacy.title: Browse the web without being tracked
proxy.privacy.body1: Our web proxy hides your real IP address and encrypts your connection, preventing websites, ISPs, and third-party trackers from monitoring your browsing activity.
proxy.privacy.body2: All traffic is routed through secure proxy nodes. The optional script blocking and ad blocking features provide additional layers of privacy and security while browsing.
proxy.about.label: About
proxy.about.seo.title: Free anonymous web proxy — browse securely without revealing your IP address
proxy.about.body1: This anonymous web proxy allows you to browse the internet without revealing your real IP address. Simply enter any URL and browse through our secure proxy servers. No software installation, browser extensions, or VPN configuration required.
proxy.about.body2: The proxy supports multiple nodes across different regions including the United States, Europe, and Asia. You can choose your preferred node for optimal speed or to access geo-restricted content. Built-in encryption protects your data in transit.
proxy.about.body3: Additional privacy features include optional JavaScript disabling to prevent malicious scripts, and ad blocking to remove intrusive advertisements. The proxy works directly in your browser with no downloads or installations needed.
proxy.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
proxy.faq.a1: A web proxy is an online service that acts as an intermediary between your browser and the websites you visit. It hides your real IP address and encrypts your connection, providing anonymity and privacy while browsing.
proxy.faq.q2: Is the proxy free to use?
proxy.faq.a2: Yes, this web proxy is completely free with no registration required. There are no data limits or speed throttling on basic usage.
proxy.faq.a3: You can access most standard websites including search engines, news sites, and informational pages. Some websites with aggressive security measures or complex JavaScript may not render correctly through the proxy.
proxy.faq.a4: No browsing history or personal data is stored on our servers. All proxy sessions are temporary and data is deleted immediately after the session ends.
proxy.faq.q5: How is this different from a VPN?
proxy.faq.a5: A web proxy works directly in your browser without any software installation, making it convenient for quick anonymous browsing. A VPN encrypts all device traffic but requires installation. For casual anonymous browsing, a web proxy is faster and more convenient.
